meta.title: 跨文化交流与误解
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on cross-cultural communication in Chinese: idioms, stereotypes, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 이문화 교류 담화: 성어, 고정관념, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「文化冲突」(wénhuà chōngtū) means "cultural conflict", arising from differing values and norms.
explanation.ko: 「文化冲突」(wénhuà chōngtū)는 가치관·규범의 차이에서 오는 '문화 충돌'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「文化冲突」是什么意思？(What does 文化冲突 mean?)

explanation.en: 「以己度人」is an idiom meaning "to judge others by one's own standards", often leading to misunderstanding.
explanation.ko: 「以己度人」는 '자신의 잣대로 남을 헤아리다'라는 뜻의 성어로, 오해를 낳기 쉽다.

questions.prompt: 「以己度人」是什么意思？(What does 以己度人 mean?)
choices: 用自己的标准去衡量、揣测别人(judging others by one's own standards)

explanation.en: 「入乡随俗」is an idiom meaning "when in a new place, follow its customs".
explanation.ko: 「入乡随俗」는 '로마에 가면 로마법을 따르라'는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「入乡随俗」是什么意思？(What does 入乡随俗 mean?)
choices: 到一个地方就顺应当地的风俗习惯(adapting to local customs when in a new place)

explanation.en: 「文化敏感度」(wénhuà mǐngǎndù) means "cultural sensitivity", the ability to perceive and respect cultural differences.
explanation.ko: 「文化敏感度」(wénhuà mǐngǎndù)는 문화적 차이를 인식하고 존중하는 능력을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「文化敏感度」是什么意思？(What does 文化敏感度 mean?)
choices: 对不同文化差异的觉察与尊重能力(the ability to perceive and respect cultural differences)

explanation.en: 「刻板印象」(kèbǎn yìnxiàng) means "stereotype", an oversimplified fixed image of a group.
explanation.ko: 「刻板印象」(kèbǎn yìnxiàng)는 특정 집단에 대한 지나치게 단순화된 고정관념을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「刻板印象」是什么意思？(What does 刻板印象 mean?)

explanation.en: 「文化冲突」means "cultural conflict".
explanation.ko: 「文化冲突」는 '문화 충돌'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 由于价值观和沟通方式的差异，跨国团队中难免会出现___。(Due to differences in values and communication styles, cultural conflict is inevitable in multinational teams.)

explanation.en: 「以己度人」means "judging others by one's own standards".
explanation.ko: 「以己度人」는 '자기 잣대로 남을 판단하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 在跨文化交流中，切忌___，用自己的文化标准去评判他人的行为。(In cross-cultural communication, one must avoid judging others by one's own standards, evaluating others' behavior according to one's own cultural norms.)

explanation.en: 「入乡随俗」means "to follow local customs when in a new place".
explanation.ko: 「入乡随俗」는 '현지 풍습을 따르다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 到了一个新的国家生活，最重要的适应策略之一便是___。(Living in a new country, one of the most important adaptation strategies is to follow local customs.)

explanation.en: 「文化敏感度」means "cultural sensitivity".
explanation.ko: 「文化敏感度」는 '문화적 민감성'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 从事跨国业务的员工需要具备较高的___，以避免不必要的误会。(Employees engaged in cross-border business need to possess a high degree of cultural sensitivity to avoid unnecessary misunderstandings.)

explanation.en: 「刻板印象」means "stereotype".
explanation.ko: 「刻板印象」는 '고정관념'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 媒体上的___往往简化甚至扭曲了不同文化群体的真实面貌。(Stereotypes in the media often oversimplify or even distort the true image of different cultural groups.)

explanation.en: 「暴露」means "to expose".
explanation.ko: 「暴露」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这起跨文化交流中的误会___了双方对彼此文化背景理解的不足。(This misunderstanding in cross-cultural communication exposed both sides' insufficient understanding of each other's cultural backgrounds.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其固守自己的文化视角妄加评判，___不如主动了解对方文化背后的深层逻辑。(Rather than rashly judging based on one's own cultural perspective, it's better to proactively understand the deeper logic behind the other party's culture.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 双方___语言相通，___由于文化背景的巨大差异，依然可能产生深刻的误解。(Even though both sides share a common language, due to enormous differences in cultural background, deep misunderstandings can still arise.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 这场跨文化谈判之所以陷入僵局，___是因为双方对同一表达存在截然不同的理解。(The reason this cross-cultural negotiation fell into a deadlock is precisely because both sides had completely different interpretations of the same expression.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 人们一旦对某个文化群体形成了固定的刻板印象，___很难以客观公正的态度重新审视。(Once people form a fixed stereotype about a certain cultural group, it becomes hard to reexamine it objectively and fairly.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，减少跨文化误解的关键___在于培养开放包容的心态。(In the final analysis, the key to reducing cross-cultural misunderstanding still lies in cultivating an open and inclusive mindset.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，语言能力与文化认知___决定着跨文化沟通的成效。(From this we can see that both language ability and cultural awareness jointly determine the effectiveness of cross-cultural communication.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，肢体语言在不同文化中___承载着截然不同的含义。(As everyone knows, body language often carries completely different meanings in different cultures.)

explanation.en: 「促进」(cùjìn) means "to promote/foster".
explanation.ko: 「促进」(cùjìn)는 '촉진하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这次文化交流活动___了两国民众之间的相互理解与友谊。(This cultural exchange event promoted mutual understanding and friendship between the peoples of the two countries.)

explanation.en: 「严重」(yánzhòng) means "serious/severe".
explanation.ko: 「严重」(yánzhòng)는 '심각한'이라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 跨文化沟通中，一个善意的玩笑也可能因文化差异而被___误解。(In cross-cultural communication, even a well-intentioned joke might be seriously misunderstood due to cultural differences.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 主动了解〜: 不如主动了解 (not 主动不如了解).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '主动了解〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如主动了解'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其固守自己的文化视角妄加评判，主动不如了解对方文化背后的深层逻辑。(Rather than rashly judging based on one's own cultural perspective, it's better to proactively understand the deeper logic behind the other party's culture.) — find the error
choices: 与其固守自己的文化视角妄加评判，不如主动了解对方文化背后的深层逻辑。
与其固守自己的文化视角妄加评判，主动不如了解对方文化背后的深层逻辑。
与其固守自己的文化视角妄加评判，不如了解主动对方文化背后的深层逻辑。
与其固守自己的文化视角妄加评判，主动了解不如对方文化背后的深层逻辑。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这场跨文化谈判之所以陷入僵局，因为是双方对同一表达存在截然不同的理解。(The reason this cross-cultural negotiation fell into a deadlock is precisely because both sides had completely different interpretations of the same expression.) — find the error
choices: 这场跨文化谈判之所以陷入僵局，是因为双方对同一表达存在截然不同的理解。
这场跨文化谈判之所以陷入僵局，因为是双方对同一表达存在截然不同的理解。
这场跨文化谈判之所以陷入僵局，是双方因为对同一表达存在截然不同的理解。
这场跨文化谈判之所以陷入僵局，双方是因为对同一表达存在截然不同的理解。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 人们一旦对某个文化群体形成了固定的刻板印象，很难才以客观公正的态度重新审视。(Once people form a fixed stereotype about a certain cultural group, it becomes hard to reexamine it objectively and fairly.) — find the error
choices: 人们一旦对某个文化群体形成了固定的刻板印象，就很难以客观公正的态度重新审视。
人们一旦对某个文化群体形成了固定的刻板印象，很难才以客观公正的态度重新审视。
人们一旦对某个文化群体形成了固定的刻板印象，才很难以客观公正的态度重新审视。
人们一旦对某个文化群体形成了固定的刻板印象，很难以才客观公正的态度重新审视。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其固守自己的文化视角妄加评判，不如主动了解对方文化背后的深层逻辑 ("Rather than rashly judging based on one's own cultural perspective, it's better to proactively understand the deeper logic behind the other party's culture").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其固守自己的文化视角妄加评判，不如主动了解对方文化背后的深层逻辑' (자기 문화적 관점을 고수하며 함부로 평가하느니 차라리 상대방 문화 이면의 깊은 논리를 능동적으로 이해하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其固守自己的文化视角妄加评判，__________对方文化背后的深层逻辑。(Rather than rashly judging based on one's own cultural perspective, it's better to proactively understand the deeper logic behind the other party's culture.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 人们一旦对某个文化群体形成了固定的刻板印象，就很难以客观公正的态度重新审视 ("Once people form a fixed stereotype about a certain cultural group, it becomes hard to reexamine it objectively and fairly").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '人们一旦对某个文化群体形成了固定的刻板印象，就很难以客观公正的态度重新审视' (사람들은 일단 특정 문화 집단에 대해 고정관념이 생기면 객관적이고 공정한 태도로 다시 살펴보기 어려워진다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 人们一旦对某个文化群体形成了固定的刻板印象，__________以客观公正的态度重新审视。(Once people form a fixed stereotype about a certain cultural group, it becomes hard to reexamine it objectively and fairly.)
